title: IRGC claims MQ-9 Reaper drone shootdown over Persian Gulf, fires at F-35 and RQ-4 Global Hawk — US not confirmed
snippet: Iran's IRGC air defense on May 26 claimed to have shot down a US MQ-9 Reaper drone over the Persian Gulf and fired at an F-35 stealth fighter and RQ-4 Global Hawk surveillance drone that entered Iranian airspace, forcing them to flee. US officials have not confirmed Iran's claim. The IRGC warned it reserves the 'legitimate and definitive' right to respond to any ceasefire violation.
tag_reason: First report of IRGC MQ-9 shootdown claim — significant escalation and capability demonstration
